examples.title: Pseudocode: Stack Operations
examples.code:
ALGORITHM StackOperations
INPUT: elements to push
OUTPUT: popped elements

BEGIN
 CREATE an empty stack
 PUSH elements onto the stack
 POP elements from the stack
 DISPLAY the popped elements
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic stack operations: push, pop, and display.

examples.explanation: This Python code implements a stack using a list and demonstrates the push and pop operations.
